---
title: "ETC5513_Assignment1"
author: Noor Fatima Moolji
format:
  html:
    theme: cerulean
  pdf: default
---


```{r}
#| label: setup
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
library (tinytex)
library (tidyverse)
library (ggplot2)
```

```{r}
# Reading Data
dat <- read.csv("data/36621293_Noor Fatima Moolji.csv")
```
